isEqual.description: Check the input is euqla to the other input

isNotEqual.description: Check the input is not equal to the other input

isDefined.description: Check the other input is defined

isNotDefined.description: Check the other input is not defined

isTrue.description: Check the other input is true

isFalse.description: Check the other input is false

isGreaterThan.description: Check the input is greater than the other input

isGreaterThanOrEqual.description: Check the input is greater than or equal to the other input

isLessThan.description: Check the input is less than the other input

isLessThanOrEqual.description: Check the input is less than or equal to the other input
